title: The Escape from Egghead Tightens
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Vegapunk, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Five Elders as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did he just say that there are world-sinking weapons...

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: A truth too hard to swallow!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...still out there somewhere?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How can an 800-year-old war be ongoing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one from back then is even alive today!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why would a war rage on...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...In total secrecy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: VEGAPUNK!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In all sincerity...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to apologize from the bottom of my heart...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...As there is something else I must confess!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My goal was always to create an energy source to fuel society's development...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: and while it remains unfinished...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My research has eliminated in the mother flame...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Its power has many practical uses!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am certain that one day, this undying energy can be harnessed to ensure that the entire world lives in abundance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This breakthrough is married, however...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...As a small fragment of the flame was stolen!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I take full responsibility for this unfortunate event!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Cipher Pol agents are stuck in the middle of the island?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is bad! They're completely surrounded by flames!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That was quite the tremor! Any idea what's happening, edisonz!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That spooked me too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The whole Goshdarn basement came Crashin' down here with all the Cipher Pol agents in tow!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah can't generate any more clouds for the straw hat crew!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Came crashing down?! How is that possible?!

dialogue.speaker: Five Elders
dialogue.text: ANOTHER MONSTROUS ELDER MUST BE HEADIN' UP.!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Stussy, get herself outta there!

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
